Table of Contents

NAME

DESCRIPTION

The file contains a list of the shells on the system. For each shell a single line should be present, consisting of the shell’s path, relative to root. A hash mark (‘‘#’’) indicates the beginning of a comment; subsequent characters up to the end of the line are not interpreted by the routines which search the file. Blank lines are also ignored.

FILES

The file resides in

SEE ALSO

HISTORY

The file format appeared in
